rules.rule_text:
private rule RookieStrings : Rookie Family
{
	meta:
		description = "Rookie Identifying Strings"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-06-25"

	strings:
		$ = "RookIE/1.0"

	condition:
		any of them
}

rule Rookie : Family
{
	meta:
		description = "Rookie"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-06-25"

	condition:
		RookieCode or RookieStrings
}
